posts.text:
→ SHARE THE REALITY IN GAZA + ACTION ITEMS ACROSS YOUR SOCIAL MEDIA.

Downloadable graphics here: bit.ly/so-gaza
→ Flood the inboxes of those in Congress and demand that they take immediate action to force “Israel” to end its illegal blockade on Gaza: afsc.org/action/tell-congress-demand-lifesaving-aid-gaza
→ Plan a protest/rally wherever you are. Here are helpful tools to get you started: wolpalestine.com/resources/rally-toolkit

🚨 TAKE ACTION FOR GAZA.

→ Donate to individual fundraising campaigns so those on the ground can access what little food there is available: linktr.ee/fundsforgaza

→ Flood the newsrooms of major media outlets and demand that they make Gaza front page news: writersagainstthewarongaza.com/action

Donate to help provide hygiene kits to the people of Gaza!

Each bag consists of :
1kg of laundry detergent
1L of dishwashing liquid
1 pack of menstrual pads
1 pack of tissue paper
1 toothpaste and a toothbrush
1 towel
1L bottle of bleach
1 bar of soap
1 bottle of shampoo
2 bottles of soap
Sanitizer

The Israeli regime allowed a total of 5 aid trucks into Gaza on Monday, which Fletcher said is “a drop in the ocean.” Per UNRWA, between 500-600 aid trucks are needed daily to address the humanitarian crisis. It was also reported that 2 of the 5 trucks allowed in on Monday contained shrouds.

Speaking to BBC Radio 4's Today, UN humanitarian chief Tom Fletcher said that thousands of trucks loaded with baby food and nutritional supplies are ready to enter Gaza but remain stopped at the border due to the Israeli regime’s blockade that has been in place since March 2.
The United Nations humanitarian chief warned on Tuesday, May 20 that up to 14,000 babies in Gaza could die "within the next 48 hours" if humanitarian aid does not reach them.
🚩 Florida could soon become the first state in the country to restrict access to STI treatment for those under the age of 18.

Have you ever heard of CoreCivic? What about GEO Group? If not, you should remember those names – they’re the two largest private prison corporations in the United States and the recipients of billions in taxpayer dollars to cage, surveil, and transport human beings in this country.
Read: open.substack.com/pub/soinform...

The Department of Education announced today that it will begin garnishing the wages of up to 5.3 million borrowers with defaulted student loans next month.

apnews.com/article/stud...

“It's hypocrisy to call yourself a Christian and chase away a refugee or someone seeking help, someone who is hungry or thirsty, toss out someone who is in need of my help... If I say I am Christian, but do these things, I'm a hypocrite.”

- Pope Francis
Israel says it will continue blocking aid to Gaza and troops will remain 'indefinitely' - https://www.middleeasteye.net/news/israel-says-it-will-continue-blocking-aid-gaza
🚨 Trump’s Attorney General Pam Bondi has directed prosecutors to seek the death penalty for Luigi Mangione.
🚨 ALL EYES ON GAZA 🚨

With the Trump administration’s promised mass deportation agenda underway, it is more important than ever to know your rights when engaging with ICE.

I teamed up with ACLU to break down exactly what you should know + remind others of as well.

More info + tools here: crnt.link/aclu-kyr-soi...

Mahmoud Khalil will be the first of many of us directly targeted by this fascistic government if we do not collectively stand up and refuse to be silent in the face of state-sanctioned kidnapping and repression.

TAKE ACTION + SHARE WIDELY: TINYURL.COM/FREEMAHMOUD

Artwork by Alex Albadree.
🚨 Call Governor Kay Ivey and urge her to grant Sonny Burton clemency: (334) 242-7100 #us #alabama #news #deathpenalty #crime

Bills to restrict abortion care will continue to be introduced at both the state and federal levels. Do not stop paying attention to what the GOP is doing to strip your rights away. #unitedstates #abortion #healthcare #us #usa #politics #legislation

🚨 URGENT: Marcellus Williams is scheduled to be executed TOMORROW. → CALL @govparsonmo 573.751.3222 (If you get a busy signal or get sent to voicemail, keep trying until you’re connected to a live person. Office hours are 8am - 5pm CST.) → AMPLIFY Marcellus’ story and calls to action across social media. → Encourage your elected officials to speak out against this wrongful execution. → Visit savemarcellus.org to learn more about the case. #marcelluswilliams #savemarcellus #missouri #unitedstates
Flood NYC for Gaza 🇵🇸 09.02.24 Led by @Within Our Lifetime 🇵🇸 + Healthcare Workers for Palestine
Citywide Day of Rage for Gaza 🇵🇸 6.10.24 @Within Our Lifetime 🇵🇸  #nyc #gaza #palestine #freepalestine #freepalestine🇵🇸❤️
Wondering what’s happening around the world? Here’s what you might have missed this week. #world #worldnews #news #palestine #sudan #congo #colombia #haiti #yemen #mexico #myanmar #iran #stayinformed
February 14, 2024 #Gaza update. #freepalestine #palestine #🍉 #ceasefirenow #ceasefire #🇵🇸
Do not stop demanding an immediate, permanent ceasefire. #ceasefirenow #gaza #israel #palestine #freepalestine #biden #joebiden

Had the honor of speaking with Norman Finkelstein—one of the world’s leading scholars and experts on Israel/Palestine—about what is currently happening in Gaza and why he believes this could be a turning point in the occupation. Check out our full conversation at the link in bio. #gaza #palestine #israel #freepalestine #normanfinkelstein
The inhumanity out of Texas knows no bounds. #texas #border #texasborder #prisonlabor #endtheexception #usa #news
